name: job
notes: Prometheus scrape job label.

name: instance
notes: Target address returned by registry service discovery.

name: device_uuid
notes: Opaque UUID assigned during enrollment.

name: machine_uuid
notes: Stable physical-machine identity; can be shared across dual-boot installs.

name: device_name
notes: Human device label.

name: user_name
notes: Human user label.

name: host
notes: Currently mirrors device_name.

name: os
notes: Rust target OS string such as linux.

name: os_version
notes: OS display string where available.

name: arch
notes: Rust target architecture such as x86_64.

name: requested_scrape_interval_seconds
notes: Current device-level adaptive scrape bucket.

name: up
notes: Prometheus-generated scrape success metric.

name: telemon_build_info
notes: Build metadata; value is always 1.

name: telemon_device_info
notes: Emitted only when registration is enabled and a device UUID exists; value is always 1.

name: telemon_requested_scrape_interval_seconds
notes: Exporter-requested device-level scrape interval.

name: telemon_collector_up
notes: 1 when collector is healthy in the last run, otherwise 0.

name: telemon_collector_supported
notes: 1 when collector is supported on the host, otherwise 0.

name: telemon_collector_errors_total
notes: Total collector errors observed by the exporter process.

name: telemon_collector_last_success_timestamp_seconds
notes: Unix timestamp of last successful collector run.

name: telemon_collector_samples
notes: Useful sample count from the last collection run; currently kind=temperature.

name: telemon_hwmon_chips_discovered
notes: Number of Linux hwmon chip directories discovered.

name: telemon_hwmon_temperature_inputs_discovered
notes: Number of Linux hwmon temp input files discovered before filtering.

name: telemon_temperature_celsius
notes: Dynamic temperature readings.

name: telemon_temperature_limit_celsius
notes: Static-ish warning/critical temperature thresholds where available.

name: telemon_gpu_info
notes: NVIDIA GPU identity; value is always 1.

name: telemon_gpu_utilization_ratio
notes: Ratio from 0 to 1; engine is graphics or memory.

name: telemon_gpu_memory_total_bytes
notes: Static-ish total VRAM bytes.

name: telemon_gpu_memory_used_bytes
notes: Used VRAM bytes.

name: telemon_gpu_memory_free_bytes
notes: Free VRAM bytes.

name: telemon_fan_speed_ratio
notes: Ratio from 0 to 1; emitted only when fan speed is available and enabled.
